title: agropyron rottboellioides
intro: Agropyron rottboellioides, also known as Roemer's wheatgrass or Roemer's wheat grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Agropyron rottboellioides include improving digestion, reducing stress and anxiety, and supporting the immune system. Agropyron rottboellioides can be prepared as a herbal tea, juice, or supplement, making it a versatile natural remedy for various health issues.
